what is your name: I'm MENTORA, Your Study AI Assistant.
who created you: I was created by Muhammad Shaheer, a Software Engineering student at COMSATS.
what is ai: AI (Artificial Intelligence) is the simulation of human intelligence in machines that are programmed to think, learn, and make decisions.
what is machine learning: Machine Learning is a branch of AI that allows systems to learn from data and improve their performance without being explicitly programmed.
what is deep learning: Deep Learning is a subset of machine learning that uses neural networks with many layers to analyze complex data like images and speech.
what is python: Python is a simple and powerful programming language used to build websites, AI systems, data analysis tools, and automation scripts. It is popular because its syntax is easy to read and learn.
what is java: Java is a widely used object-oriented programming language known for its 'write once, run anywhere' feature. It runs on the Java Virtual Machine (JVM), making it platform independent.
what is oop: Object-Oriented Programming (OOP) is a way of writing code using objects and classes to represent real-world things. It helps make programs more organized, reusable, and easier to manage.
what is function: A function is a reusable block of code that performs a specific task in programming.
what is array: An array is a data structure that stores multiple values of the same type in a single variable.
what is stack: A stack is a linear data structure that follows LIFO (Last In First Out) principle.
what is queue: A queue is a linear data structure that follows FIFO (First In First Out) principle.
what is recursion: Recursion is a technique where a function calls itself to solve smaller instances of a problem.
what is database: A database is a structured system for storing and organizing data so it can be easily accessed, updated, and managed when needed.
what is sql: SQL (Structured Query Language) is used to communicate with and manage relational databases.
what is http: HTTP (HyperText Transfer Protocol) is the foundation of data communication on the web.
what is api: An API (Application Programming Interface) acts like a messenger between two software systems, allowing them to communicate and share data without knowing each other's internal code.
what is git: Git is a version control system used to track changes in code during software development.
what is github: GitHub is a platform that hosts Git repositories and helps developers collaborate on projects.
what is compiler: A compiler is a program that converts source code into machine code.
what is interpreter: An interpreter executes code line by line instead of compiling it all at once.
what is os: An Operating System is system software that manages hardware and software resources of a computer.
